overall.description: A cinematic sequence from a video game showing a prospector at a riverside campsite who mounts a horse and rides away, followed by a smooth camera exploration along the rocky shore, through shallow river water, and up a dirt path toward a large rock formation with a railway bridge visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside prospector camp with gold panning equipment

events.description: character stands up from the prospecting table and walks toward the horse
character mounts the horse and rides away along the riverbank

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint watching the character interact with camp equipment and depart on horseback

notable_agents.action: panning for gold at a wooden table, then walking to a horse, mounting it, and riding away into the distance

entered.detail: rough wooden table with a metal pan and sorting boxes for gold panning
simple canvas lean-to shelter providing shade over the camp area
brown horse tethered near the camp waiting for the character
calm river water along the rocky shoreline
gravel and stone ground surface of the riverbank

segments.scene_description: At a sunny riverside camp, a prospector character works at a wooden panning table before walking to a tethered horse, mounting up, and riding away along the shore, leaving the campsite behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank with scattered vegetation and large boulders

events.description: camera detaches from the character and begins moving independently along the shoreline
camera moves from dry rocky shore into the shallow water at the river's edge

agents.ego_description: moving smoothly along the riverbank, navigating around rocks and vegetation toward the water

entered.detail: large gray boulder sitting on the rocky shore
metal railway bridge spanning the river in the distance
green leafy bushes growing along the waterline

segments.scene_description: The camera glides along the rocky riverbank, passing the abandoned camp and moving through scattered vegetation, with a large metal railway bridge becoming visible in the distance as the camera approaches the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with clear water and visible rocky bottom

events.description: camera moves into the river water and continues traveling toward the opposite bank
camera approaches the opposite shore and begins angling upward toward the hillside

agents.ego_description: moving through shallow water toward a large rocky outcrop on the opposite bank, with the railway bridge visible to the right

entered.detail: large rocky hill formation with steep cliffs and sparse trees on top
clear shallow river water with visible stones and pebbles beneath the surface

segments.scene_description: Moving through the clear shallow water, the camera approaches the opposite shore where a massive rocky outcrop dominates the view, while the railway bridge spans across the background to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep dirt trail ascending toward the base of a rock cliff

events.description: camera exits the water and begins ascending the dirt path up the hillside
camera continues up the steepening trail, approaching closer to the rock face

agents.ego_description: climbing the winding dirt path up the hillside toward the base of the large rock formation

entered.detail: steep worn dirt path with visible wagon tracks leading up the hillside

segments.scene_description: Exiting the water, the camera ascends a steep dirt trail toward the imposing rock formation, with the railway bridge receding into the distance to the right as the cliff face looms larger ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a sunny riverside campsite and ascends toward a towering rock formation. It begins by watching a prospector work at a panning table before he mounts a tethered horse and rides away along the shore. As the rider departs, the camera glides past the abandoned camp and through scattered vegetation, revealing a large metal railway bridge in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera moves through clear shallow water toward the opposite bank, where a massive rocky outcrop dominates the view. Finally, the camera exits the water and climbs a steep dirt trail, with the railway bridge receding to the right as the imposing cliff face looms larger ahead.
